position: relative;

grid-template-rows: repeat(20,minmax(24px, auto));

minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)
repeat(8, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))

minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)
repeat(24, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))

}

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><h4 style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true"><em>Island Crooners delivers a sophisticated blend of classic vocals, island elegance, and concert-level performance—crafted for theaters, broadcast, and premium audiences worldwide. </em></h4></div>

.fe-69c599044f1dd236ba1794e2 {
--grid-gutter: calc(var(--sqs-mobile-site-gutter, 6vw) - 11.0px);
--cell-max-width: calc( ( var(--sqs-site-max-width, 1500px) - (11.0px * (8 - 1)) ) / 8 );

display: grid;
position: relative;
grid-area: 1/1/-1/-1;
grid-template-rows: repeat(46,minmax(24px, auto));
grid-template-columns:
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)
repeat(8, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);
row-gap: 11.0px;
column-gap: 11.0px;
overflow-x: hidden;
overflow-x: clip;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
.background-width--inset .fe-69c599044f1dd236ba1794e2 {
--inset-padding: calc(var(--sqs-site-gutter) * 2);
}

.fe-69c599044f1dd236ba1794e2 {
--grid-gutter: calc(var(--sqs-site-gutter, 4vw) - 11.0px);
--cell-max-width: calc( ( var(--sqs-site-max-width, 1500px) - (11.0px * (24 - 1)) ) / 24 );
--inset-padding: 0vw;

--row-height-scaling-factor: 0.0215;
--container-width: min(var(--sqs-site-max-width, 1500px), calc(100vw - var(--sqs-site-gutter, 4vw) * 2 - var(--inset-padding) ));

grid-template-rows: repeat(44,minmax(calc(var(--container-width) * var(--row-height-scaling-factor)), auto));
grid-template-columns:
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)
repeat(24, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);
}
}

.fe-69c9d69379b9805b51e6d1ec {
--grid-gutter: calc(var(--sqs-mobile-site-gutter, 6vw) - 11.0px);
--cell-max-width: calc( ( var(--sqs-site-max-width, 1500px) - (11.0px * (8 - 1)) ) / 8 );

display: grid;
position: relative;
grid-area: 1/1/-1/-1;
grid-template-rows: repeat(11,minmax(24px, auto));
grid-template-columns:
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)
repeat(8, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);
row-gap: 11.0px;
column-gap: 11.0px;
overflow-x: hidden;
overflow-x: clip;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
.background-width--inset .fe-69c9d69379b9805b51e6d1ec {
--inset-padding: calc(var(--sqs-site-gutter) * 2);
}

.fe-69c9d69379b9805b51e6d1ec {
--grid-gutter: calc(var(--sqs-site-gutter, 4vw) - 11.0px);
--cell-max-width: calc( ( var(--sqs-site-max-width, 1500px) - (11.0px * (24 - 1)) ) / 24 );
--inset-padding: 0vw;

--row-height-scaling-factor: 0.0215;
--container-width: min(var(--sqs-site-max-width, 1500px), calc(100vw - var(--sqs-site-gutter, 4vw) * 2 - var(--inset-padding) ));

grid-template-rows: repeat(20,minmax(calc(var(--container-width) * var(--row-height-scaling-factor)), auto));
grid-template-columns:
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)
repeat(24, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);
}
}

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><p style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true"><em> Island Crooners, </em></p><p style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true"><em>Thank you very much! You fellas are a very talented ‘Rat Pack’ style of entertaining in the most complimentary way. Keep up the good work and keep doing your thing! Best, Albert </em>‍ ‍</p><p style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true"> (Albert Wing - musician with George Benson, Diana Ross)</p></div>

</div></div></div><div class="fe-block fe-block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774841080941_8069"><div class="sqs-block website-component-block sqs-block-website-component sqs-block-html html-block" data-block-css="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.styles.css&quot;]" data-block-scripts="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.visitor.js&quot;]" data-block-type="1337" data-definition-name="website.components.html" data-sqsp-block="text" data-website-component-id="yui_3_17_2_1_1774841080941_8069" id="block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774841080941_8069"><div class="sqs-block-content"><div class="sqs-text-block-container">
<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><p style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">United by legacy, rhythm, and soul, these four artists represent a movement—not just a musical act. Their combined experience spans international tours, Billboard Hits, cinematic soundtracks, and cultural milestones. Whether performing solo or as a collective, they bring emotional storytelling, genre-defying artistry, and a shared commitment to healing and unity through music.</p></div>

minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)

minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);

column-gap: 11.0px;

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><p style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true"><strong>Legacy. Rhythm. Soul. Unity.</strong></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true"><em>A celebration of four powerhouse artists whose journeys span decades of musical excellence, cultural impact, and heartfelt performance.</em></p></div>

</div>
</div></div></div><div class="fe-block fe-block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_10600"><div class="sqs-block website-component-block sqs-block-website-component sqs-block-html html-block" data-block-css="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.styles.css&quot;]" data-block-scripts="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.visitor.js&quot;]" data-block-type="1337" data-definition-name="website.components.html" data-sqsp-block="text" data-website-component-id="yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_10600" id="block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_10600"><div class="sqs-block-content"><div class="sqs-text-block-container">
<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><p style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">🎙️ Angelo Pagán: Multifaceted Performer/Recording Artist&nbsp;/Actor</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">Angelo Pagán is a dynamic force in music and film whose career spans decades of vibrant artistry and cross-cultural impact. He began his professional journey recording backup vocals with legendary percussionist Mongo Santamaría, later collaborating with Johnny Polanco, La Palabra, and the iconic Tito Puente. His solo work with Morrowland Records and a chart-topping release on Nasty Mix Records—Summer Passion, which reached #1 in Kaua’i—cemented his place in Latin music history. Angelo’s touring credits include performances with celebrated vocalist Julia Mijanes and powerhouse acts like Tito Nieves, Celia Cruz, and Marc Anthony.</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">His cinematic presence includes roles in major motion pictures such as Swordfish and Dance with Me, where he contributed both as an actor and vocalist on the soundtrack. Most recently, Angelo appeared in season two of Bosch: Legacy, continuing to expand his creative reach with new projects on the horizon. With a career defined by versatility and emotional resonance, Angelo remains a vital voice in the entertainment landscape.</p></div>

</style>



</div>
</div></div></div><div class="fe-block fe-block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_11239"><div class="sqs-block website-component-block sqs-block-website-component sqs-block-html html-block" data-block-css="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.styles.css&quot;]" data-block-scripts="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.visitor.js&quot;]" data-block-type="1337" data-definition-name="website.components.html" data-sqsp-block="text" data-website-component-id="yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_11239" id="block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_11239"><div class="sqs-block-content"><div class="sqs-text-block-container">
<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><p style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">🎶 Albert “Little Albert” Maligmat: Vocalist&nbsp;/Multi-Instrumentalist&nbsp;/Legacy Performer</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">Albert “Little Albert” Maligmat is a pioneering Filipino-American artist whose career began at age seven, performing with his family band, The Rocky Fellers. Their breakout hit “Killer Joe” soared to #16 on the Billboard Hot 100 in 1963, launching Albert into the national spotlight. He opened for legendary entertainers including Bob Hope, Sammy Davis Jr., George Burns, and Joan Rivers, and shared the Apollo Theater stage with Stevie Wonder, Patti LaBelle, The Temptations, and Smokey Robinson. His early success helped pave the way for Asian-American representation in pop music.</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">Albert’s versatility led him to perform with celebrated show groups such as The Society of Seven, The Mob, Liz Damon and the Orient Express, and his own ensemble, Little Albert’s Workshop. His television appearances span classic programs like The Ed Sullivan Show, Dinah Shore, and Jackie Gleason, marking him as a fixture in the golden era of variety entertainment. A true trailblazer, Albert continues to inspire through his enduring contributions to music and cultural storytelling.</p></div>

</div>
</div></div></div><div class="fe-block fe-block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_12912"><div class="sqs-block website-component-block sqs-block-website-component sqs-block-html html-block" data-block-css="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.styles.css&quot;]" data-block-scripts="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.visitor.js&quot;]" data-block-type="1337" data-definition-name="website.components.html" data-sqsp-block="text" data-website-component-id="yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_12912" id="block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_12912"><div class="sqs-block-content"><div class="sqs-text-block-container">
<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><p style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">🥁 Ricardo “Tiki” Pasillas: Master Percussionist/ Vocalist&nbsp;/Educator</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">Ricardo “Tiki” Pasillas is a celebrated drummer, percussionist, and vocalist whose four-decade career bridges performance, education, and cultural artistry. Renowned for his fluency in Latin, jazz, and contemporary styles, Tiki has toured and recorded with global icons including Herb Alpert, Marc Anthony, and Jennifer Lopez. His studio credits include Transformers: Rise of the Beasts and Sing, where he translated and performed a reimagined version of The Doobie Brothers’ “Listen to the Music.” His rhythmic precision and soulful energy have made him a sought-after collaborator across genres.</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">Beyond the stage, Tiki is a passionate educator, mentoring students of all ages in drum set, world percussion, and vocal performance. His teaching blends technique, creativity, and industry insight—empowering aspiring artists to navigate both the craft and the business of music.</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">A proud alumnus of Berklee College of Music and Musician’s Institute, he continues to inspire through bilingual instruction and culturally rooted pedagogy.</p></div>

</div>
</div></div></div><div class="fe-block fe-block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_13977"><div class="sqs-block website-component-block sqs-block-website-component sqs-block-html html-block" data-block-css="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.styles.css&quot;]" data-block-scripts="[&quot;https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.html/a9b584ce-4b94-486f-8c1f-e5805c097649_466/website.components.html.visitor.js&quot;]" data-block-type="1337" data-definition-name="website.components.html" data-sqsp-block="text" data-website-component-id="yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_13977" id="block-yui_3_17_2_1_1774833383325_13977"><div class="sqs-block-content"><div class="sqs-text-block-container">
<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><p style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">🎼 Gerald Ishibashi: Producer/Vocalist/Entertainment Architect</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">Gerald Ishibashi is a visionary performer and producer whose lifelong dedication to music and event creation has shaped Southern California’s entertainment landscape. He began his professional journey at age 13 as frontman of Stonebridge Band—a name that translates directly from “Ishibashi”—and quickly expanded into concert promotion, realizing his dream of working with childhood heroes like Three Dog Night, Tower of Power, Bill Medley (Righteous Brothers), Blood, Sweat &amp; Tears and The Beach Boys. Stonebridge transformed into a high-energy performance ensemble known for its dynamic horn section, soulful arrangements, and electrifying stage presence.</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">As founder of Ishibashi/Stonebridge, Gerald has produced and performed in concert alongside Kool &amp; The Gang, The Pointer Sisters, The Bangles, Richard Street of The Temptations, The Shirelles, Little Anthony, Will Champlin, and the iconic show group The Society of Seven—as well as legendary Hawai‘i performers Kalapana and Willie K. His concert production portfolio also includes working with musical legends such as Blondie, Pat Benatar, Michael McDonald, Rick Springfield and Toto. Known for curating iconic events like Taste of Newport, Hard Rock Concerts/Newport and the Newport Centennial concerts, Gerald blends strategic insight with artistic passion.</p></div>

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><div class="sqsrte-scaled-text-container"><span class="sqsrte-scaled-text"><h1 style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">Let’s Bring Your Vision to Life!</h1></span></div></div>

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content><p class="" style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true"></p><p class="" style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">Ready to create something extraordinary? Let’s create unforgettable moments together! For concert bookings, PAC and cultural events, or media inquiries, reach out to our team.</p><p class="" style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">Email: IslandCrooners@gmail.com</p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-align: center; ; white-space:pre-wrap;" data-rte-preserve-empty="true">‍ ‍</p></div>

.fe-69c599044f1dd236ba1794f1 {

display: grid;
position: relative;
grid-area: 1/1/-1/-1;
grid-template-rows: repeat(47,minmax(24px, auto));
grid-template-columns:
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)
repeat(8, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);
row-gap: 11.0px;
column-gap: 11.0px;
overflow-x: hidden;
overflow-x: clip;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
.background-width--inset .fe-69c599044f1dd236ba1794f1 {

--container-width: min(var(--sqs-site-max-width, 1500px), calc(100vw - var(--sqs-site-gutter, 4vw) * 2 - var(--inset-padding) ));

grid-template-rows: repeat(38,minmax(calc(var(--container-width) * var(--row-height-scaling-factor)), auto));
grid-template-columns:
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)
repeat(24, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);
}
}

display: grid;
position: relative;
grid-area: 1/1/-1/-1;
grid-template-rows: repeat(22,minmax(24px, auto));
grid-template-columns:
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr)
repeat(8, minmax(0, var(--cell-max-width)))
minmax(var(--grid-gutter), 1fr);

<header class="newsletter-form-header">
<div class="newsletter-form-header-description"><p data-rte-preserve-empty="true" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">Subscribe to our newsletter for updates, behind-the-scenes insights, and early access to upcoming opportunities.</p></div>
</header>

</div>
</div>

class="
newsletter-form-button

>

</button>

</form>
